name: Blueberry"pop" Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 9-inch pie shell and bake until golden brown. Allow to cool completely.
2. Place 2 cups of the cooled raw blueberries into the prepared pie shell.
3. Cook the remaining 2 cups of berries, water, sugar, lemon juice, cornstarch, and salt in a saucepan over medium heat until thickened.
4. Stir in the butter.
5. Pour the mixture evenly over the berries in the pie shell.
6. Chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
7. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
